untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'exhausted trend', 'first pullback', and 'pattern support/resistance levels' which are qualitative/pattern-based concepts not expressible with quantitative indicators alone. Threshold parameters for pullback_retracement_min_pct, pullback_retracement_max_pct, and stop_distance_atr_multiple were marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be inferred. Used ADX for trend confirmation, price_pos_20 for pullback zone detection, and pivot levels as proxy for pattern support/resistance, but this is an approximation.
translation_notes: Used adx_14 > 25 to detect strong directional spike/exhaustion. Used price_pos_20 (0.3-0.7 range) to approximate pullback retracement zone within middle 40% of 20-bar range. Used pivot S1/R1 levels as proxy for pattern support/resistance. Stop loss set at 2.0% as conservative default. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Actual implementation requires manual pattern recognition overlay.
